headline: New long-term care rider from Aflac offers flexibility and added security
summary: The cost of long-term care continues to rise, making caregiving challenging for many Americans. That is why Aflac Incorporated, the leading provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S.,1 has added a powerful new worksite benefit to its Group Life Term to 120 product. This hybrid term life with long-term care (LTC) product is the first of its kind to offer true protection against higher costs of caring for individuals as they age and will help protect the financial stability of American
